title: DayCounter+
description: DayCounter+ displays the current world day, time of day, coordinates, and world name in a clean HUD-style bar, helping players easily track time progression while playing on survival or SMP servers. 🌅
body:
# ☀️ DayCounter+

**A simple and immersive Minecraft plugin that displays the current world day and time in a beautiful HUD-style format.**

DayCounter+ enhances your gameplay by showing the **current day, time of day, world name, and coordinates** directly on the screen. This helps players easily track time progression in survival worlds and SMP servers.

Perfect for **SMPs, survival servers, and adventure maps**.

---

# ✨ Features

### 📅 Day Tracking

Automatically displays the **current world day**.

Example:

```
Day 1
Day 2
Day 50
Day 100
```

---

### ⏰ Time Display

Shows the **current time of day** in readable format.

Available times include:

• Morning
• Noon
• Evening
• Night
• Midnight

---

### 📍 Coordinate Display

Players can see their **live coordinates**.

Example:

```
-4016, 70, -4740
```

This helps with navigation and location tracking.

---

### 🌍 World Detection

Displays the **world name** players are currently in.

Example:

```
Day 2 | Noon | world
```

Useful for servers with **multiple worlds**.

---

### 🎨 Clean HUD Style

Information appears in a **clean Minecraft-style bar** that blends naturally with gameplay.

---

# 🖥️ Perfect For

• SMP Servers
• Survival Worlds
• Adventure Maps
• Roleplay Servers
• Hardcore Worlds

---

# ⚙️ Compatibility

Recommended for:

✔ Paper
✔ Purpur
✔ Spigot

Minecraft Version: **1.20+**
